# my-next-app

A Next.js application with App Router.

## Getting Started

First, install dependencies:

```bash
npm install
```

Then, run the development server:

```bash
npm run dev
```

Open [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000) with your browser.

## Deploy

```bash
npm run build
npx vercel --prod
```

## Learn More

See the [Next.js docs](https://nextjs.org/docs).
